rule_metadata.author: Ensar Şamil, @sblmsrsn, OSCD Community
rule_metadata.title: SyncAppvPublishingServer Bypass Powershell Restriction - PS Module

rules.rule_text:
title: SyncAppvPublishingServer Bypass Powershell Restriction - PS Module
id: fe5ce7eb-dad8-467c-84a9-31ec23bd644a
related:
- id: fde7929d-8beb-4a4c-b922-be9974671667
  type: derived
- id: 9f7aa113-9da6-4a8d-907c-5f1a4b908299
  type: derived
status: test
description: Detects SyncAppvPublishingServer process execution which usually utilized
  by adversaries to bypass PowerShell execution restrictions.
references:
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Syncappvpublishingserver/
author: "Ensar \u015Eamil, @sblmsrsn, OSCD Community"
date: 2020-10-05
modified: 2022-12-02
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1218
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: ps_module
  definition: 0ad03ef1-f21b-4a79-8ce8-e6900c54b65b
detection:
  selection:
    ContextInfo|contains: SyncAppvPublishingServer.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- App-V clients
level: medium
